🐞 Bug Report

Description

Provide a clear and concise description of the issue.

Steps to Reproduce

1. Open GhostIDE.
2. Navigate to ...
3. Perform ...
4. Observe the issue.

Expected Behavior

Describe what should have happened.

Actual Behavior

Describe what actually happened.

Screenshots / Screen Recording

If applicable, attach screenshots or a screen recording.

Logs

If available, attach relevant logs or stack traces.

Environment

- GhostIDE Version:
- Android Version:
- Device Model:
- CPU Architecture: (arm64-v8a / armeabi-v7a / x86_64)
- Language:
- Theme: (Light / Dark)
- Project Type: (Java / Kotlin / HTML / etc.)

Additional Information

Add any additional context that may help reproduce or diagnose the issue.

Checklist

- [ ] I searched existing issues before creating this report.
- [ ] I can consistently reproduce this issue.
- [ ] I have included all relevant information and logs.
